birdsarentreal
  • API Reference

create_instance

Flask application factory.

Call instance() to create and configure the Flask app with all blueprints registered and the two app-level routes (home dashboard and about me) attached.

Attributes

babel

Functions

instance()

Create, configure, and return the Flask application.

Module Contents

create_instance.babel[source]
create_instance.instance()[source]

Create, configure, and return the Flask application.

Registers all blueprints under their respective URL prefixes, sets the secret key, and defines the ‘/’ and ‘/about_me’ routes directly on the app (since they are role-agnostic and do not belong to any blueprint).

Returns:

The fully configured application instance.

Return type:

Flask
